name: Slide Left
description: New page enters from the left while the current page exits rightward. Perfect for back-navigation or reversing through a stack.
demoAnimations: @keyframes slide-left-out { from { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } to { transform: translateX(40px); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes slide-left-in { from { transform: translateX(-40px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } } .slide-left-out { animation: slide-left-out 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) forwards; } .slide-left-in { animation: slide-left-in 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) forwards; }

transitions/slide-left/link.tsx
